AI Agents & Frameworks.title: OpenAI Introduces ChatGPT Atlas: A Chromium-based browser with a built-in AI agent
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: OpenAI has introduced ChatGPT Atlas, a new Chromium-based browser that integrates a built-in AI agent to enhance user experience. This release marks a significant step towards more integrated AI assistance in daily web browsing.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Skyvern-AI / skyvern

AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: DeepMind introduces SIMA, a generalist AI agent designed to operate across diverse 3D virtual environments, learning to perform a wide range of tasks. This research advances the capability of AI in complex digital worlds.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Building Effective AI Agents

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Why we no longer use LangChain for building our AI agents

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Koinify: The Future of Crypto Crowd Funding

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Crypto’s new funding mechanisms: down and dirty guide

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Nasdaq, Citi Join Novogratz in Funding Blockchain Firm Symbiont
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq, Citi, and Mike Novogratz's Galaxy Digital have invested in blockchain firm Symbiont, marking significant institutional backing for the company and highlighting growing traditional finance interest in enterprise blockchain solutions.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is allocating Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) funds to advance blockchain technology. This initiative aims to foster innovation in blockchain for various government applications.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Funding Blockchain Ecosystems
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: This research piece discusses strategies and challenges involved in funding various blockchain ecosystems. It explores different approaches to capital allocation and sustainable growth within the blockchain sector.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Indian Banks to Start Blockchain-Based Funding for SMEs to Avoid Defaulters
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are developing a blockchain-based platform to facilitate funding for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) and mitigate default risks. This initiative aims to streamline lending processes and enhance financial transparency.
